title: I never noticed this cut from Death before
display_title: I never noticed this cut from Death before
wikitext:
[]: I never noticed this cut from Death before             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Mon Sep 07, 2009 2:19 am Right after Asuka learns Kaji is dead and right before Shinji meets Kaworu, there's a pan-shot of the city, and you see this: [url]http://img.photobucket.com/albums/v600/FallenTabris/Clipboard02.jpg[/url] It's an odd angle of Asuka in the EoE strangling scene, the camera's view spying from the hallway Shinji came out of in said scene. Kinda neat.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 07, 2009 2:23 am Awww.... I wanna cry now. I'll have to see that in context with the scene. I'm more of a visual guy and can't really get stuff from the description.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Sep 07, 2009 11:08 am Yes, there's threads that mention that shot, maybe in the AN archive. The theory is that in real life Shinji just stood there in the doorway watching her, unable to help her. (i.e., That shot is a Shinji's eye POV.) In Instrumentality, he finally offered to help her, while demanding help himself, and got rejected.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:49 pm that would make sense. it's implied it's his nature not to step in for anyone right when Kaji dies, so his doing so would be decent dreamstate fodder. but I figured it was his view of her right before he enters said scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Sep 08, 2009 8:27 am Why does Asuka look so attractive in that shot I wonder if the whole scene never really happen with him strangling her. You just never truly know.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Tue Sep 08, 2009 9:17 am See This Thread for that one
